display.purpose: Page-level titles. Used once per page. 'Analytics', 'Settings'.

headline.purpose: Section headings within cards. 'Recovery Activity', 'Recent Activity'.

kpi.purpose: Financial values only. Dollar amounts, percentages, multipliers. Color varies by semantic role.

body.purpose: Descriptive text, banner copy, empty states. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Card category labels, table column headers, nav section dividers. Always uppercase.

caption.purpose: Dates, axis ticks, secondary table data. Floor: 11px.

motion.name: status-pulse
motion.purpose: Defense Status Bar dot only. The single rest-state animation in the product.

motion.name: state-transition
motion.purpose: Hover/focus state changes on interactive elements.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: One primary action per screen. Emerald fill is earned by rarity.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #10B981; color: #ffffff; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.60 0.17 162); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #10B981; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions and inline CTAs. Steps back visually.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #94A3B8; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #F1F5F9; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3B82F6; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: KPI Card
components.description: Four-up financial metric card. Label above, mono value, subtext below. No icons.
components.html:
MRR PROTECTED

$1,240

recovered this month
components.css: .ds-kpi-card { background: #1A2035; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius: 12px; padding: 20px; } .ds-kpi-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #475569; margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-kpi-value { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-kpi-sub { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #475569; margin: 0; }

components.name: Recovery Badge
components.description: Paused / Discounted / Recovered outcomes. Emerald translucent pill.
components.css: .ds-badge-recovery { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(16,185,129,0.10); color: #10B981; border: 1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.20); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Risk Badge
components.description: Active dunning / Cancellation type. Amber translucent pill.
components.css: .ds-badge-risk { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(245,158,11,0.10); color: #F59E0B; border: 1px solid rgba(245,158,11,0.20); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Loss Badge
components.description: Cancelled / Failed outcomes. Red translucent pill.
components.css: .ds-badge-loss { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(239,68,68,0.10); color: #EF4444; border: 1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.20); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Metric Badge
components.description: Dunning type / neutral metrics. Blue translucent pill.
components.css: .ds-badge-metric { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(59,130,246,0.10); color: #3B82F6; border: 1px solid rgba(59,130,246,0.20); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Nav Item (Active)
components.html: Analytics
components.css: .ds-nav-active { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); color: #F1F5F9; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; }

components.name: Defense Status Bar
components.description: Signature element. Top strip on every dashboard page. Pulsing dot = system is alive.
components.html:
Revenue protection active · Monitoring 4 recovery sequences
Last updated just now
components.css: .ds-status-bar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); } .ds-status-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #94A3B8; } .ds-status-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #10B981; flex-shrink: 0; animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.6,1) infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.4; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-status-dot { animation: none; } } .ds-status-time { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; color: #475569; }

narrative.overview:
Unchurnly's visual system is built around a single idea: the product is working right now, whether the founder is watching or not. The dashboard is a status report from something that never sleeps. Every surface should communicate stability and control — not urgency, not celebration, not alarm.

The palette is deliberately dark and instrument-like. Three depth layers (canvas, sidebar, card) create a quiet spatial hierarchy without any shadows. Color is rationed: only four semantic signals (emerald = recovered, blue = neutral metrics, amber = at risk, red = loss) appear against a near-colorless ground. Nothing is used for decoration.

Typography reinforces the register: Inter for all interface text at a tight scale, JetBrains Mono reserved exclusively for financial values. The mono numbers carry physical weight — they read like accounting, not dashboards.
keyCharacteristics: Four semantic colors only; never decorative
JetBrains Mono on all financial values; Inter on all UI text
Uppercase tracking-widest labels as the only typographic hierarchy marker
Full-width layout; no max-width cap on the dashboard canvas
The pulsing emerald dot (Defense Status Bar) is the only motion at rest

rules.name: The Semantic Seal Rule
rules.body: Emerald, amber, and red are never used outside their semantic roles. No emerald hover states. No amber decorative accents. No red in illustrations.

rules.name: The Layering Rule
rules.body: Depth is created through three discrete background values (#0F1117, #161B27, #1A2035), never through shadows or gradients.

rules.name: The Mono Gate Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is used on financial values and code snippets only. Navigation, button labels, table text, and body copy always use Inter.

rules.name: The Scale Ceiling Rule
rules.body: No UI text exceeds 18px. KPI values at 36px are the sole exception and are visually separated by weight, family, and color contrast.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows are prohibited on cards, panels, sidebars, and tables. The recharts tooltip is the one documented exception.

dos: Do use Emerald Signal (#10B981) exclusively for recovered/saved outcomes and the primary action button.
Do render all financial figures in JetBrains Mono.
Do use uppercase + tracking-widest (0.08em) for all card category labels only.
Do express all depth through tonal surface steps. Add white/5 borders to cards.
Do keep all semantic chip colors consistent: translucent fill + matching solid border.
Do keep the Defense Status Bar on every authenticated dashboard page.
Do keep the emerald pulsing dot as the only rest-state animation.
donts: Don't use Emerald Signal, Amber Risk, or Danger Red decoratively.
Don't use box shadows on card surfaces, sidebars, or panels.
Don't use gradient backgrounds. Flat fills only.
Don't put colored icon circles on KPI cards.
Don't use JetBrains Mono for navigation, button labels, banners, or headings.
Don't let the chart be the visual hero. KPI values are the primary hierarchy.
Don't use the Intercom/HubSpot aesthetic: no color blocks as decoration, no celebratory copy.
Don't drop below 11px for any visible text.
Don't use more than one primary (emerald) button per screen.
